impactLevels.name: Negligible
impactLevels.description: The effects of damage are low and can be neglected. Business activity and/or the reputation of the company is not slightly affected.

impactLevels.name: Limited
impactLevels.description: The effects of the damage are limited and manageable. Very limited impact on the company's business and/or the reputation of the company.

impactLevels.name: Considerable
impactLevels.description: The effects of damage can be considerable. Significant impact on the company's business and/or the reputation of the company.

impactLevels.name: Threatening the existence of the organization
impactLevels.description: The effects of the damage can reach a catastrophic level that threatens the existence of the company. Results in sanctions, lawsuits or a halt of business.

likelihoodLevels.name: Rarely
likelihoodLevels.description: According to present knowledge, the event could occur every 5 years at most.

likelihoodLevels.name: Medium
likelihoodLevels.description: The event occurs once every 5 years to once a year.

likelihoodLevels.name: Frequently
likelihoodLevels.description: The event occurs once a year to once a month.

likelihoodLevels.name: Very frequently
likelihoodLevels.description: The event occurs several times a month.
